extraction_reasoning: The litigation summary table is present but its OCR-rendered rows and values are unreadable, so no criminal, statutory/regulatory, tax, or other against-vs-by counts or quantified group litigation amount can be reliably extracted; the separate statement that there are no criminal matters at the FIR stage is not a complete litigation-table total. The contingent-liabilities figure is the explicitly stated total of ₹78.76 million as of June 30, 2023, comprising Income Tax of ₹69.91 million and a Civil Suit amount of ₹78.76 million; converted at ₹10 million per crore, the stated total is ₹7.876 crore. The only concentration disclosure concerns the top five showrooms and suppliers, not company-wide customers, so no customer concentration percentage is extracted; no relevant denominator or full-fiscal customer period is disclosed. The usable monetary table unit is million, and the conversion applied is million ÷ 10 = crore.
